message: That day, it was evening before I woke up.
After what happened yesterday, I couldn't sleep until early morning.
Master closed the store down for the day, so I just slept until now.

name: Hasaki
message: "Th-The phone... It's Kimura-san!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Kimura-san?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, it's me."

name: Hasaki
message: "What happened?"

name: Kimura
message: "Well, that incident from yesterday is being treated as a suicide, so no one is accusing me of being a murderer."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, that's good."

name: Kimura
message: "The police don't think that I'm the culprit, but they're investigating me as a person potentially involved with the past several deaths."

name: Hasaki
message: "R-Really?"

name: Kimura
message: "Apparently, a drug dealer was attacked by a young man last night."

name: Hasaki
message: "A drug dealer? Um..."

name: Kimura
message: "Illegal drugs, of course. After that, the members of some sort of gang moved to protect themselves, and the police have been moving in response to them."

name: Kimura
message: "People have told me that I should just hand myself in to the police. The police would put me in jail at worse, but this gang would kill me if they caught me."

name: Hasaki
message: "W-Will you be okay?"

name: Kimura
message: "I was investigating the drug trade in this town, so it's not like I'm completely unrelated. One of my friends is trying to help clear up the misunderstanding."

name: Kimura
message: "I met with a bunch of people who wanted to talk about that stuff, so I wasn't able to gather much information today. Sorry."

name: Hasaki
message: "You don't have to be sorry. You had a lot on your plate."

name: Kimura
message: "I sure did. I'm not completely cleared of all guilt yet either, so it's not like this is past tense."

name: Kimura
message: "If we can bring the truth to light, people will have no reason to doubt me anymore. Then I won't be targeted by anyone. But right now both the police and the thugs are looking for me."

name: Kimura
message: "The police think that the deaths might've happened under the influence of illegal drugs, even if they weren't homicides. They're definitely still investigating the situation."

name: Hasaki
message: "Under the influence..."

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah. That's the reason why I wanted to investigate the drug trade here. This city is pretty famous for being the center of a lot of drug activity."

name: Hasaki
message: "What about my brother?"

name: Kimura
message: "It doesn't seem like he's being targeted. All the attention is focused on me right now."

name: Kimura
message: "But that's just a matter of time."

name: Kimura
message: "The police say that they've gotten the names of several students who were in frequent contact with the dead drug dealer, though."

name: Hasaki
message: "Did my brother know those people?"

name: Kimura
message: "I don't think the police will hear his name from any of them. At the very least, I've never seen him talking to any of them."

name: Kimura
message: "But if any of the students who were buying drugs happen to get caught, there's a good chance they might snitch on your brother."

name: Kimura
message: "I've seen him taking drugs away from them with my own eyes."

name: Hasaki
message: "I see..."

name: Kimura
message: "And the things that happened at Kita High... Like when your brother injured a teacher."

name: Hasaki
message: "Did something like that actually happen?"

name: Kimura
message: "They say that he smashed a flower vase over a teacher's head during class."

name: Kimura
message: "The school hasn't told the police about what happened, but that's probably just a matter of time too."

name: Kimura
message: "Because of his unusual behavior, people will assume that he's got his hands in the drug trade as well."

name: Kimura
message: "Well, for better or worse, they're chasing me because I was in the school when Mrs. Senagawa jumped off the roof and killed herself, so they're not focused on anyone else right now."

name: Hasaki
message: "Sorry. It seems like I've gotten you into a lot of trouble."

name: Kimura
message: "What do you mean? This is my job. I got involved because I wanted to. It's a lot of fun being right in the middle of everything, though."

name: Hasaki
message: "Hahaha, try to be serious here. I wouldn't want anything to happen to you."

name: Kimura
message: "What if it did? Are you worried about me?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Of course I'm worried about you."

name: Kimura
message: "That must be my adult charm at work."

name: Hasaki
message: "You don't have any of that."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, you're so quick to cut me down."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, right. There's one more thing, but I'm not sure if I should tell you about this."

name: Hasaki
message: "What is it?"

name: Kimura
message: "Your brother... He came home."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Kimura
message: "I don't know whether he's the man you call Tomosane, though."

name: Kimura
message: "Anyway, I have somewhere else I have to go right now."

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um, Kimura-san!"

name: Hasaki
message: "He hung up..."
Nii-san is in the house?
That was probably the new Yuki-san.
She was always the one I saw at the house.
But if it was Tomo Nii-san...

name: Hasaki
message: "If Tomo Nii-san went back to the house, he wouldn't know that I'm staying here."
I hadn't thought of a way of telling him that.
I thought Kimura-san might be able to tell him, but Kimura-san wasn't watching the house at all times.
If Tomo Nii-san came home when no one was there...

name: Hasaki
message: "No one would be able to tell him where I am."

name: Hasaki
message: "I don't know who's in the house right now, but..."
But still, if that was Tomo Nii-san...
And even if it wasn't him, the other two wouldn't be able to recognize me at all.
In the classroom, they just recognize me as the twins, but in the house I would probably be removed from their consciousness in order to maintain consistency.

name: Hasaki
message: "Maybe..."
Maybe I should leave a note for Nii-san, in case he comes home, telling him that I'm at the Hakushuukyou bar.

name: Hasaki
message: "There's no danger, right?"
I knew I was just making convenient excuses for my actions.
No matter what the reason, though, I wanted to be sure.
It'd been so long since I saw Tomo Nii-san... I just wanted to see him again.
If there was even a small chance of seeing him again, then I'd bet it all on that.
I took the train from Suginomiya back to my house.
It wasn't that far.
It always felt like a quick ride before, but this time it was a very long train ride.
As I watched the scenery drift by...
I thought about a lot of different things.
About today.
About the past.
About Tomo Nii-san's relationship with Takuji Nii-san. And about Yuki-san, who protected me.
And, after that... the days I've lived with him since that day.
No, not just with him.
I lived those days with Tomo Nii-san and Yuki-san, and Takuji Nii-san as well.
The incident that changed everything in my life, and the incident that completely changed my family...
Everything from that moment in time, leading up to me being here today...
Tomo Nii-san's kindness...
Takuji Nii-san's curse...
And Yuki-san's...

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah!"
I was lost in thought, but then a sign flashed by with my station's name on it.
The train slowed as it approached the station.
I arrived at my destination.
There was a light on in the house.
So he really did come home.

name: Hasaki
message: "I wonder who it is."
There was a light on in the living room.
Someone was in my brother's room on the second floor.
I quietly went upstairs.
He was doing something with his phone in the middle of the room.
That wasn't his phone.
None of them really spend that much time playing with their phone.
I wonder who it is...

name: Mamiya
message: "They were deleted just yesterday, so I should be able to retrieve all the important messages."

name: Mamiya
message: "There was a list of the different messages from Takashima around here."
He was doing something with the phone while watching the computer out of the corner of his eye.
He must be investigating something.

name: Mamiya
message: "Whoa... There are a ton of them."
I wonder whose phone that is.

name: Mamiya
message: "This doesn't seem like a ghost. It looks like someone was leading Mrs. Senagawa on."
Mrs. Senagawa. She's the one who died yesterday.
He must be investigating Mrs. Senagawa's death, which means...

name: Hasaki
message: "It's Yuki-san... Or maybe Tomo Nii-san?"
Which one is it?
I couldn't tell because he wasn't saying much.
If I come out now, Yuki-san won't recognize me, but Tomo Nii-san will.
Then I should just go for it.

name: Mamiya
message: "I'm just curious."
He called someone with the phone in his hand.
And then...

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh?!"
There was a quiet ringing sound in the room.
Which means that the phone he called was in the room.
For some reason, he was shocked by that fact.
It was like he couldn't believe what he was hearing.

name: Mamiya
message: "Why is the sound coming from inside this room when I called Takashima-san's phone?"
He called Takashima-san's phone?
Then that ringing just now was Takashima-san's phone?

name: Mamiya
message: "What the―!"
He pulled open the desk drawer where the sound was coming from.
And lying there was...

name: Mamiya
message: "This is..."
That cell phone.
It was the phone that Takuji Nii-san brought back to the house a few days ago.
I remembered how he was touching it and mumbling something to himself.
I remembered that it was creepy how the case was broken.
That was... Takashima-san's phone.
But why would Takuji Nii-san have something like that?

name: Mamiya
message: "Takashima... Zakuro's cell phone?"
He fearfully picked up the phone.
He probably didn't know that Takuji Nii-san was the one that put it there.
Does that mean this is the new Yuki-san?

name: Mamiya
message: "N-No way... Wait. For the moment, just calm down."
After looking at the phone, he collapsed back into his chair.

name: Mamiya
message: "Wh-What am I doing... Kuh... What's this?"
When he sat down, he knocked some white powder off the table...
What is that powder?

name: Mamiya
message: "Wh-What am I doing?"
He opened the window and tried to dump the powder out the window, but then the wind blew it all over the room.

name: Mamiya
message: "What's wrong with me?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Whoa."
I looked at the door post that I was holding onto and saw fingerprints on it.

name: Hasaki
message: "They use this stuff in detective shows, right?"
It was some kind of powder that reveals fingerprints.
I didn't know he had something like that.

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh? What is this?"
I heard a note of despair in his voice.

name: Mamiya
message: "These are..."
The scattered powder showed all the fingerprints in the room. On the desk, on the drawer, on the closet...
Nii-san trembled at the sight of those fingerprints.

name: Mamiya
message: "Th-They're the same as the ones on Takashima-san's desk... Why?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Wh-Why? Her cell phone is in my room, as well as the same fingerprints that were on her desk."

name: Mamiya
message: "Why?"
It was the new Yuki-san.
And she was under a terrible misunderstanding.
Those were her own fingerprints.
She thought those were someone else's fingerprints. They're probably the fingerprints of the culprit she was chasing after.
In other words, they were Takuji Nii-san's fingerprints.
She was probably terrified because she saw Takuji Nii-san's fingerprints all over the room.
Of course his fingerprints were all over the room.
Because Yuki-san and Takuji Nii-san are the same person, they have the same fingerprints.
It's not surprising at all that his fingerprints would be all over the room.

name: Mamiya
message: "This is..."
When I saw Yuki-san trembling like that, I ran into the room without thinking.

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh?"
When she saw me, Yuki-san's expression froze.
Oh, shoot...
I was just worried about Yuki-san.

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um, Yuki-san, wait!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Calm down! You don't need to be afraid of me!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Eek!"
N-No good. She probably did recognize me, but she refused the information.
When someone refuses to recognize something, that recognition always turns to fear.
So right now I must be terrifying to her.

name: Hasaki
message: "I'm sorry, Yuki-san."

name: Mamiya
message: "Aaaaaahh!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yuki-san!"
What was I doing?
I probably only confused Yuki-san even more, and in a situation like that... I'm really the worst.
Anyway, I should clean this up.
I wiped off all the powder on the surfaces in the room.
Then...

name: Kimura
message: "Hasaki-chan, you came back to the house."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, yeah..."
Kimura-san apologized when he saw my expression and figured out what had happened.

name: Kimura
message: "I guess I shouldn't have said anything. It wasn't him."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh... Sorry, I guess my information wasn't useful this time."

name: Kimura
message: "I had someone watching the house for me. He told me someone was in the house, so I came back to see who it was."

name: Hasaki
message: "What about the job you were doing?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, we're pretty much finished."

name: Kimura
message: "I can't do anything about the police, but I managed to clear up the misunderstanding with the people I work with."

name: Hasaki
message: "That's good to hear."

name: Kimura
message: "And I did a bit of digging while I was there."

name: Kimura
message: "You said something happened seven years ago, so I went through all the national and local newspapers from that time period."

name: Kimura
message: "I found out about a certain incident that took place in a town called Sawaimura."

name: Kimura
message: "Everyone involved was underage, so there were no names. I got in touch with the reporter, though, and made him give me the names."

name: Kimura
message: "This tragedy began on that day."

name: Kimura
message: "I'm right, aren't I?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes."

name: Kimura
message: "Tell me if I'm wrong about any of this... Or, well, I understand if you don't want to talk about it. Pretend like I'm just talking to myself."

name: Kimura
message: "But if my inference is correct, then I might be able to find this Tomosane-kun that you've been looking for."

name: Kimura
message: "The Mamiya Takuji-kun here today... isn't the real Mamiya Takuji-kun."

name: Kimura
message: "The person who is called Mamiya Takuji today isn't listed as Mamiya Takuji on the family register."

name: Kimura
message: "According to official records, Mamiya Takuji is already dead."

name: Kimura
message: "He's a person that no longer exists."

name: Kimura
message: "The family register says that the only living brother you have today is the eldest Mamiya brother, Mamiya Tomosane."

name: Kimura
message: "The person you call Tomo Nii-san."

name: Kimura
message: "Is that correct?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes."

name: Kimura
message: "And during the incident which happened seven years ago, he killed Mamiya Takuji-kun."

name: Hasaki
message: "No, that's not true."

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san didn't kill him."

name: Hasaki
message: "It's not his fault! Tomo Nii-san was just―"

name: Kimura
message: "I understand. I heard what happened back then."

name: Kimura
message: "Tomosane-kun was the victim. It wasn't his fault."

name: Kimura
message: "It was a classic case of self-defense. Mamiya Takuji-kun was the one at fault."

name: Kimura
message: "He was just protecting you from Takuji-kun, who threatened you with a knife, and then Takuji-kun was killed in the struggle."

name: Kimura
message: "It was a complete accident."

name: Kimura
message: "No one has any reason to blame Tomosane-kun."

name: Kimura
message: "That was the official ruling as well."

name: Kimura
message: "But there were some people who thought differently."

name: Kimura
message: "One was your mother, and the other was..."

name: Kimura
message: "Tomosane-kun himself."

name: Kimura
message: "He felt so much guilt for killing his own brother, Mamiya Takuji, that he denied his own personality."

name: Kimura
message: "He wanted to do something for Mamiya Kotomi-san, who had been traumatized by the loss of her Takuji-kun... and so his personality changed, as if Takuji-kun's soul had been transferred into his body."

name: Kimura
message: The doctor's diagnosis was secondary structural dissociation associated with PTSD. Personality misidentification thought to be a type of dissociative disorder or depersonalization."

name: Kimura
message: "The symptoms include a disassociation of the experiencing self and the observing self, but it's rare for the disassociated self to take the shape of a dead person like Mamiya Takuji-kun."

name: Kimura
message: "To put it simply, he has a disease which causes him to mistake himself for another person. That was the diagnosis."

name: Kimura
message: "I met the doctor who first diagnosed him."

name: Kimura
message: "Normally, he wouldn't be able to tell me any of this, but he opened up when I told him that Tomosane-kun might be related to the recent deaths."

name: Kimura
message: "But the doctor didn't know how far his case had progressed."

name: Kimura
message: "He was shocked when he heard that the disassociated self had split into a third personality."

name: Kimura
message: "The third personality... In other words, he has dissociative identity disorder, which is more commonly known as multiple personality disorder."

name: Kimura
message: "These symptoms appeared after he got out of the hospital."

name: Kimura
message: "From what I've heard, his mother made a unilateral decision to stop all treatment."

name: Kimura
message: "It's still a mystery why Minakami Yuki and Tomosane-kun's personalities later reappeared."

name: Kimura
message: "And something else I heard from the doctor... There's no clear medical reason why he would begin to believe his own name is Yuuki Tomosane rather than Mamiya Tomosane."

name: Kimura
message: "The only thing they can say for sure is that these symptoms appeared in his particular case."

name: Kimura
message: "After that, your mother raised Tomosane-kun as if he was actually Takuji-kun."

name: Kimura
message: "That's why he's listed as Mamiya Takuji in the school records."

name: Kimura
message: "Of course, that's inconsistent with the family register, but the school never had a reason to investigate him."

name: Kimura
message: "Kotomi-san also must've forged quite a few official documents. Otherwise, there are too many things that can't be explained."

name: Kimura
message: "We don't know whether she did all this maliciously, or if she was simply out of her mind."

name: Kimura
message: "The tragedy unfolding right now was engendered by the tragedy of seven years past."

name: Hasaki
message: "That's not true."

name: Hasaki
message: "What happened seven years ago isn't causing all of this to happen."

name: Hasaki
message: "My birth itself set into motion all the events leading up to today."

name: Hasaki
message: "The tragedy began in the moment that I was born into this world."

name: Kimura
message: "That's wrong."

name: Hasaki
message: "No, it's true. My life―my cursed life―brought unhappiness to everyone around me."

name: Hasaki
message: "I killed Takuji Nii-san, and I made Tomo Nii-san bear that curse."

name: Hasaki
message: "And Yuki-san, who was completely innocent... I got her wrapped up in this too."

name: Hasaki
message: "The entire tragedy came about because I was born."

name: Kimura
message: "No! That's not true!"

name: Kimura
message: "Please don't say that!"

name: Kimura
message: "What about the woman who saved your life so many years ago? What would she think if she heard you saying that?"

name: Kimura
message: "The young daughter of Master Minakami, the one who protected you."

name: Kimura
message: "What about her? What would she think if she heard you saying such sad things about yourself?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yuki-san..."

name: Kimura
message: "Minakami Yuki was the daughter of Master Minakami, the owner of Hakushuukyou."

name: Kimura
message: "His daughter put her life on the line to protect you both, so now he treats you like you're his own children."

name: Kimura
message: "He chose to give up his life as a warrior and live together with the two of you."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes."

name: Kimura
message: "Your birth didn't cause any of this to happen."

name: Kimura
message: "It's not your fault. It's not Tomosane-kun's fault either."

name: Kimura
message: "So we have to stop Mamiya Takuji."

name: Kimura
message: "We have to expel his vengeful spirit."

name: Hasaki
message: "Kimura-san..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Aren't you completely unrelated to all of this? I wouldn't want to cause you more trouble."

name: Kimura
message: "What are you talking about? I'm here of my own free will. I want to be here for you until the end."

name: Hasaki
message: "Kimura-san..."

name: Kimura
message: "Have I finally captivated you with my adult charm? What do you think?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Kimura-san, are you an idiot?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I... I only love Tomo Nii-san."

name: Kimura
message: "Hahaha, I know that."

name: Kimura
message: "I'm cursed to be a virgin forever."

name: Kimura
message: "I understand."

name: Kimura
message: "The kind of wonderful woman that I would fall in love with will always have someone else in their thoughts."

name: Kimura
message: "I'm used to getting turned down."

name: Kimura
message: "So go ahead and cry it out."

name: Kimura
message: "You can cry on my shoulder."

name: Hasaki
message: "Kimura-san..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Are you seriously trying to seduce me?"

name: Kimura
message: "Huh? Did you think I was joking?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I mean, you and me... No matter what happened, that's a bit..."

name: Kimura
message: "I guess so, hahaha."
Kimura-san patted me on the head.

name: Kimura
message: "It's a joke. Just a joke. I know how much you love your Tomosane Nii-san."

name: Kimura
message: "There's no way you could fall in love with an old man like me."

name: Hasaki
message: "I might've considered it if Tomo Nii-san wasn't alive."

name: Kimura
message: "Huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "But Tomo Nii-san is still alive, so I can't."

name: Kimura
message: "I figured..."
Kimura-san drove me back to Hakushuukyou.
On the way home...
We passed over a hill I'd never gone over before.
As I crested that hill...
I saw the night's sun.
It was in the same neighborhood where I'd grown up, but I never even knew these huge sunflowers were here.
The downy flowers sparkled white with dew.
The moon was blue and the flowers were yellow.
It looked as if the sun and moon each stood in the other's place.
The ever-dazzling sun stood upon our Earth, and the moon in the sky finally shone with its own brilliance.
The yellow of the sunflower was dyed with the blue of the moonlight.
It was a beautiful sight to behold.
But the vigorously blooming sunflowers looked somehow frail.
Sunflowers reaching out to the darkness of a night sky.
My eyes chased after the sunflowers even as I sat inside the car.
Like suns reflecting the light of the moon.
Suns bathed in blue...
My eyes followed them until they faded from view.
I never told Master where I was going, so he was very stern with me.
He was so mad at me that he made me cry.
But when I saw how upset he was, I felt like I really understood what Kimura-san was trying to tell me before.
Master... Yuki-san's father... He loves us like his children.
The very same children who Yuki-san gave her life to protect.
Kimura-san escorted me to the bar and then went back to the Mamiya house.

name: Kimura
message: "There are still a lot of things I need to investigate."

name: Kimura
message: "Next time I see him, I'll bring him to you if I can confirm who he is."

name: Kimura
message: "I just need to check whether or not he's your Tomo Nii-san."
Near midnight, the bar's heavy door opened.
The bell on the door tinkled quietly.
Even though the sign had read closed all day.
Master tried to tell the customer that we weren't open today.
Then he froze in place.
A familiar face stood in the doorway.
A face I'd seen just hours before.
But something was a little different.

name: Master
message: "O-Oh?"

name: Kimura
message: "Hello... It's me, Kimura."

name: Master
message: "Oh, does that mean..."
Kimura took a bow, as if he was introducing a royal guest.
The person that Kimura-san had brought with him...
There was only one person it could be.
It was exactly who I was looking for.
My jaw shook as I tried to say something.
The words were stuck in my throat.
I couldn't get the words to come out right.
Just one word...
It's just my brother's name.
I gathered all my courage...
Just so that I could speak.

name: Hasaki
message: "T-Tomo Nii-san?"
The man in front of me gave a sly smile.
Then he finally answered.

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah... It's me, Tomosane."

name: Hasaki
message: "Uwaaaah!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-Whoa, Hasaki."
I jumped into his arms so fast that he fell back against the door. I couldn't restrain myself.
I couldn't hold back. I just cried into his chest.
It was Tomo Nii-san, right here with me.
The Tomosane Nii-san who I fell in love with.
The person who was always, always there by my side.
He tried to mask his embarrassment by laughing at me.
His was a smile that neither Yuki-san nor Takuji Nii-san could ever replicate.
There was only one person in the world that could show me a smile like that.
That's why...
That's why I...

name: Hasaki
message: "I thought I would never see you again. I was so sure. Things were just getting crazier and crazier with Takuji Nii-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "Crazy, huh? I guess so..."

name: Hasaki
message: "You probably don't know what's been happening, but a lot of people have been dying and going missing."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, I can follow the traces of his memory. I do share the same brain with that bastard, for what it's worth."

name: Master
message: "Huh? You can do that?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I learned how to do it just recently. I got a bit of training."

name: Master
message: "Hmm, and it seems like you've grown up a bit since I last saw you. Something's changed, for sure. Did something happen?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Nothing in particular, really.
After Mamiya Takuji beat me up, I spent a lot of time wandering through a dream."

name: Master
message: "A dream?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah. I met Yuki for a little while."

name: Master
message: "Yuki? Oh, I see. Hmm..."

name: Tomosane
message: "What?"
Master looked very happy.
Master never told Yuki-san's personality that he was actually her father.
Neither did Yuki-san ever know that she had been Master's daughter when she was alive.
People view Yuki-san as nothing more than a split personality, the side effect of a disease.
As if she was nothing more than another one of Tomo Nii-san's delusions.
But Master always believed.
He always believed that the Yuki-san personality really was his daughter, and that her soul had gone into Tomo Nii-san's body so that she could save him.
He told me that Yuki-san was still here on Earth because she needed to protect Tomo Nii-san and expel Takuji's curse from his body.
Dissociative identity disorder.
It's easy to rationalize the phenomenon with a label, but the human heart has more intricacies than that diagnosis could ever convey.
And the soul, too, holds its own secrets.

name: Master
message: "Hahahaha, I can still see a bit of her in you."

name: Tomosane
message: "Who?"

name: Master
message: "Oh, nothing. I'm just talking to myself. Besides, don't you need to talk to Hasaki-chan about something?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yes."

name: Master
message: "Weren't you in a rush? Go right ahead."

name: Tomosane
message: "All right."
Then Nii-san took a step away from me.
He saw the disappointment on my face and held up one finger, as if to say that it would only be for a moment.
Even a moment together with him was precious to me.

name: Master
message: "Hmm?"

name: Tomosane
message: "But first... Master!"

name: Master
message: "What?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Please step outside!"

name: Master
message: "Outside? What, you want to talk to me alone?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No. I'm telling you to step outside with me!"

name: Master
message: "Huh?"

name: Master
message: "You want to hook up?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "No! I'm telling you to step your ass outside!"

name: Master
message: "Hehehe... What's wrong? This is rare from you."

name: Tomosane
message: "It's not just rare. It's the first time... Asking your instructor to step outside is like suicide."

name: Master
message: "But you're still saying it?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yes... Please."

name: Master
message: "All right."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Tomo Nii-san?"

name: Tomosane
message: "The truth is, I came home just to tell you one thing. But there's something I have to confirm before I can say it."

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um, Tomo Nii-san..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I had a dream..."

name: Hasaki
message: "A dream?"

name: Master
message: "That's what you said earlier. You met Yuki, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yes, I met Yuki, and she taught me how to control my dreams."

name: Master
message: "Controlling your dreams, huh?
Like a lucid dream?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You know about it?"

name: Master
message: "Yeah, that state of mind is often used in the world of martial arts."

name: Tomosane
message: "Is it? Then I definitely need to ask you something, so please step outside."

name: Master
message: "Jeez, is that the hip new catchphrase that all the fresh meat are saying?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Please don't call me fresh meat. That's disgusting."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Wh-What?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Master? Tomo Nii-san?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Just give us a moment."

name: Hasaki
message: "B-But I haven't seen you in so long..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't worry about me. I'll be right back."

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san!"
I tried to chase after him.
Then Kimura-san stopped me.

name: Hasaki
message: "Kimura-san!"

name: Kimura
message: Calm down. They're probably just going up to the roof."

name: Hasaki
message: "The roof?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, they go up there if they're going to practice martial arts. That's what I heard, anyway."

name: Hasaki
message: "Why do they need to practice?"

name: Kimura
message: "No, today they're not practicing."

name: Hasaki
message: "Wh-What are you talking about?"

name: Kimura
message: "Tomosane-kun is trying to surpass his master, Minakami-san."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? He's trying to beat Master?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, that's right."

name: Hasaki
message: "Wh-Why?"

name: Kimura
message: "I think you should hear that from Tomosane-kun."

name: Hasaki
message: "Kh!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san!"

name: Hasaki
message: "It's been so long, Tomo Nii-san!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san!"

name: Tomosane
message: "H-Hasaki?"

name: Kimura
message: "Ahahaha,
I couldn't stop her. She insisted..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Master, stop it! Tomo Nii-san looks awful."

name: Tomosane
message: "Shut up! Just be quiet, Hasaki!"

name: Master
message: "Oh... Is that what you really want to say to her?"

name: Hasaki
message: "...I'm not going to shut up..."

name: Hasaki
message: "I'm not going to shut up! Do... Do you understand how I feel seeing..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I understand."

name: Hasaki
message: "You don't understand! You're only saying that because you don't understand!"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's not true!"

name: Tomosane
message: "It's not because I don't understand. I'm only saying this because I really do understand."

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I only came back because there was one thing I needed to tell you."

name: Tomosane
message: "If I say those words, then nothing else matters."

name: Hasaki
message: "That's what I mean! You don't understand at all! You can't just say one thing and leave! I want to sit and talk with you more... I want to talk with you as long as I can, Tomo Nii-san!"

name: Hasaki
message: "But you always make up your mind and decide things on your own."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, that's right. You're right, Hasaki. I'm always being stubborn and making selfish decisions."

name: Hasaki
message: "Then why is there just one thing? That's nowhere near enough! I want to talk to you more! Just one thing isn't enough!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki... How many is enough? If this one thing I came to tell you isn't enough, then how many is?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I don't know. I just want to talk to you more, more, more... As much as I can... That's all."

name: Tomosane
message: "Me too..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I want to talk to you, Hasaki! Not just about one thing, but as much as I can!"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's why I came here tonight to tell you this one thing!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? You mean..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I won't disappear! I will beat Mamiya Takuji! And I'll still be here to protect you!"

name: Hasaki
message: "T-Tomo Nii-san..."

name: Tomosane
message: "It won't be Yuki or Master protecting you... It will be me!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki! I'll come home alive! I'll definitely come back for you!"

name: Tomosane
message: "So don't worry!"

name: Hasaki
message: "T-Tomo Nii-san..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'll beat this stupid tranny, and then I'll beat Mamiya Takuji!"

name: Master
message: "Who's a stupid tranny? That's not how you should talk to your master, especially after he just beat you up."

name: Tomosane
message: "Sorry, Master... I shouldn't have said that, but..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I will defeat you!"

name: Master
message: "I can see your knees quaking, you know?"

name: Tomosane
message: "A warrior shakes with anticipation before a battle!"

name: Master
message: "You've sure changed."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm fed up with all this shit. I don't care about being cool and mysterious or whatever anymore."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm totally done with that shit, so yeah, I've changed."
He was already beaten up.
He got knocked around by Master before I came.
He was covered in bruises and cuts.
Anyone could see that there was a difference in absolute power here.
The situation was desperate.
And still, he fought on.

name: Tomosane
message: "Master, you never could beat the master back at the dojo, my grandfather."

name: Master
message: "Of course not. Who could?"

name: Master
message: "This school of ancient martial arts, passed down from the Sengoku Period, has just a few hundred basic techniques."

name: Master
message: "There are tens of thousands of different combinations of those techniques."

name: Master
message: "But for him, that wasn't a problem. He had some sort of primal instinct... Well, that was a very religious dojo, and each successor to the dojo had something like psychic powers."

name: Tomosane
message: "That blood flows in my veins too... That's probably what I'm feeling right now."

name: Tomosane
message: "I gave you my word..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Now it's my turn."

name: Master
message: "Your... turn?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Controlling one's dreams... I only understood the meaning of those words by standing here before you, Master, in the real world."

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san!"
It felt like time stopped in that moment.
Time stood still, not moving into the past or the future.
Like something that simply exists.
The next moment seemed to stretch into eternity.
The two silhouettes sprang into motion.

name: Master
message: "Ugh!"

name: Master
message: "Whoa... Take... it easy..."

name: Tomosane
message: "...I did it!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san! You're covered in bruises..."

name: Kimura
message: "Wow... He won."

name: Master
message: "Hey, isn't anyone worried about me?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Does it hurt?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I would be lying if I said it didn't."
I went and got the medicine box.
Why did he have to get beaten up right after he came back?
He's just like he always was.
Every time Tomo Nii-san comes back to me, it's just like this.

name: Hasaki
message: "You're covered in bruises."

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, I got in a bit of a fight. Of course I am."
Every time you come back, you look like this...
I almost said that, but then I stopped.
Tomo Nii-san had no memory of the distant past.
He was convinced that he was actually Mamiya Takuji, and his personality was just created by Takuji Nii-san.
So... Tomo Nii-san had thrown away all of his own memories.
And all of our happy days in Sawaimura, too.

name: Hasaki
message: "Why would you do that? Jeez, Tomo Nii-san..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I told you. I did it so I could protect you."

name: Tomosane
message: "So that I can be with you from now on."

name: Hasaki
message: "You'll be with me... from now on?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, that's right."

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san, you won't go away?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Of course not. I'm not going anywhere. We can talk for as long as you want."

name: Hasaki
message: "Really?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Really."

name: Hasaki
message: "But you always lie to me like that."

name: Tomosane
message: "Heh... I guess I do."

name: Hasaki
message: "Honestly, I want to tie you up with duct tape so you can't go anywhere."

name: Tomosane
message: "That might work."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, but..."

name: Hasaki
message: "I believe in you, Tomo Nii-san..."

name: Hasaki
message: "I've been betrayed so many times before, but I still believe in you, Tomo Nii-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why? I'm such a good-for-nothing brother."

name: Hasaki
message: "Because you're my hero."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hero?"

name: Hasaki
message: "That's right. The hero is stronger than the savior."

name: Tomosane
message: "What? That doesn't make any sense."

name: Hasaki
message: "But it's true."

name: Tomosane
message: "You're right."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm stronger than him."

name: Tomosane
message: "I definitely won't lose."
My promise with Tomo Nii-san.
He broke the last promise, but...
I still believe.
Because he's my brother, and he's my hero.
So I'll believe in him.
